headline: Did Eversource’s Aquarion Exit and Pure-Play Shift Just Redefine ES’s Risk-Reward Profile?
summary: Eversource Energy recently held its second-quarter 2026 earnings call, following the July 30 release of results, to brief analysts on its financial performance and business updates via a public webcast. The company’s repositioning as a pure-play regulated electric and natural gas utility, funded in part by the nearly US$1.70 billions Aquarion sale, highlights a sharper focus on core infrastructure and grid reliability investments. We’ll now examine how Eversource’s sharpened focus as a...
